    The class loader used to register generated class bytecode.
    Methods in dev.morphia.critter.parser.generator with parameters of type CritterClassLoader in in
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EntityModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.entityModel(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Generates and registers the entity model class for the given type.
    EntityModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.entityModel(Class<?> type, Class<?> standinType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Generates and registers the entity model class for the given type, reading entity-level annotations from standinType.
    EntityModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader)
    Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes using build-time (non-runtime) mode.
    EntityModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, boolean runtimeMode)
    Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes.
    PropertyAccessorGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
    Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given field.
    PropertyAccessorGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given getter method.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the property exposed by the given getter method.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field, reading annotations from annotationSource.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field, boolean runtimeMode)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field, reading annotations from annotationSource.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given method, reading annotations from annotationSource.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method, boolean runtimeMode)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given method, reading annotations from annotationSource.
    Constructors in dev.morphia.critter.parser.generator with parameters of type CritterClassLoader in in
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    BaseGenerator(Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader)
     
     
    EntityModelGenerator(Mapper mapper, Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Creates a new entity model generator where the entity class is also the annotation source.
     
    EntityModelGenerator(Mapper mapper, Class<?> type, Class<?> standinType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Creates a new entity model generator for the given entity, reading entity-level annotations from standinType (which differs from type only for @ExternalEntity).
     
    PropertyAccessorGenerator(Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
     
     
    PropertyAccessorGenerator(Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
     
     
    PropertyModelGenerator(MorphiaConfig config, Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
    Creates a generator for a field-based property where the entity class is also the annotation source.
     
    PropertyModelGenerator(MorphiaConfig config, Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Creates a generator for a method-based property where the entity class is also the annotation source.
     
    PropertyModelGenerator(MorphiaConfig config, Class<?> entity, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
    Creates a generator for a field-based property where the entity class is also the annotation source.
     
    PropertyModelGenerator(MorphiaConfig config, Class<?> entity, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field, boolean runtimeMode)
    Creates a generator for a field-based property.
     
    PropertyModelGenerator(MorphiaConfig config, Class<?> entity, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Creates a generator for a method-based (getter) property.
     
    PropertyModelGenerator(MorphiaConfig config, Class<?> entity, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method, boolean runtimeMode)
    Creates a generator for a method-based (getter) property.
     
    VarHandleAccessorGenerator(Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
    Creates a generator for a field-based property accessor using a VarHandle.
     
    VarHandleAccessorGenerator(Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Creates a generator for a method-based property accessor using MethodHandles.
